description:
## File
src/repositories/story_repository.cr

## Problem
find_timeline_items already computes total_count via COUNT(*) OVER() window function, making count_timeline_items redundant when called alongside it. The expensive CTE runs twice per timeline page load.

## Fix
When find_timeline_items returns a total_count, skip the separate count_timeline_items call. Or remove count_timeline_items entirely and always use the window function approach.
title: Remove redundant count_timeline_items CTE call
